```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.95em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border:1.5px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <span style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2C8475,#3DA18A);color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:0.75em;">✓</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#1F5E54;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">do</span>
   </div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.65;color:#564232;">
    <li>· symlink <strong>individual skill folders</strong></li>
    <li>· add to <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#2C8475;">.gitignore</code></li>
    <li>· track canonical in git</li>
    <li>· use <strong>absolute</strong> paths</li>
   </ul>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);border:1.5px solid #D45F47;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
    <span style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#D45F47,#B5476A);color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;font-size:0.75em;">✕</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#7A2418;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">don't</span>
   </div>
   <ul style="list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.65;color:#564232;">
    <li>· symlink whole <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#D45F47;">.claude/</code></li>
    <li>· commit symlinks to git</li>
    <li>· cross machines without sync</li>
    <li>· use <strong>relative</strong> paths</li>
   </ul>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
